title: Update questions form colors to burgundy/white and show motivational message on submission

requirements.text: Change the questions/doubts form section colors to burgundy (guindo) and white color scheme, applying burgundy as the primary accent color and white as the background/text color

quotes: cámbiale los colores a guindo ya blanco

acceptanceCriteria: The questions form section uses burgundy (guindo) as the primary accent color
White is used appropriately for backgrounds and contrast
The color scheme is consistent with burgundy and white theme
All form elements (inputs, buttons, labels) follow the new color palette

requirements.text: Display a prominent success message reading 'No se van a arrepentir de estudiar en el COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías' (You won't regret studying at COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías) in large title text when users submit their questions/doubts through the form

quotes: cuando envíen sus dudas Seles aparecen unas palabras de que no se va a repetir de estudiar en el
desaparezca una pantalla que diga cosas que no se van a arrepentir de estudiar en el Censadec 35 de Gómez Farías

acceptanceCriteria: After successful form submission, a large title message appears with the text 'No se van a arrepentir de estudiar en el COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías'
The message is displayed prominently with large, readable typography
The message replaces or overlays the form upon successful submission
The messaging is motivational and encouraging in tone

constraints: Do not implement email sending functionality - this is explicitly out of scope
Only modify the questions/doubts form section identified by the XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/section[2]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]
Preserve existing form validation and backend submission functionality
Maintain the form's data structure and submission flow
nonGoals: Adding email sending capabilities to forward questions to omaralexander1829@gmail.com
Modifying other sections of the website beyond the questions form
Changing the hero section, about section, or enrollment form colors
Implementing email integration or SMTP services
